hub.description: Hub core — routes inbound messages, dispatches to voice/LLM/image/clipool workers. Both inbox case variants retained: nats.py default uses lowercase _inbox.hub.> (hub does not set inbox_prefix at connect time, tracked as a bug); uppercase _INBOX.hub.> kept for ADR-051 compliance once fixed.
hub.notes: Stream provisioning is a deploy-time admin operation — hub does not create/update streams at runtime. $JS.API.STREAM.CREATE/UPDATE.LYRA_AUDIT are intentionally absent from publish ACLs.

telegram-adapter.description: Telegram bot adapter — inbox narrowed to _INBOX.telegram-adapter.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant.

discord-adapter.description: Discord bot adapter — inbox narrowed to _INBOX.discord-adapter.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant.

voice-tts.description: voicecli nats-serve TTS worker on Machine 1 (#689). Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.voice-tts.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant; both case variants retained for nats-py case-sensitivity compatibility. Explicit _inbox.hub.> publish grant added per postmortem Fix 2.

voice-stt.description: voicecli nats-serve STT worker on Machine 1 (#689). Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.voice-stt.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant; both case variants retained for nats-py case-sensitivity compatibility. Explicit _inbox.hub.> publish grant added per postmortem Fix 2.

llm-worker.description: Reserved LLM worker identity — publishes health status, subscribes to LLM request queue. Explicit _inbox.hub.> publish grant added per postmortem Fix 2.

image-worker.description: imagecli nats-serve satellite (ADR-050, imageCLI#50 + #754). Publish ACLs narrowed per #949 — broad _INBOX.>/_inbox.> removed now that imagecli sets inbox_prefix=_INBOX.image-worker at connect time (ADR-051). allow_responses covers reply publish; _INBOX.image-worker.> subscribe added for receive-side ACL completeness. Explicit _inbox.hub.> publish grant added per postmortem Fix 2.

monitor.description: Monitoring identity — full pub+sub on lyra.monitor.> namespace.

clipool-worker.description: CliPool NATS worker — receives claude subprocess dispatch commands from hub, publishes heartbeat and reply-path responses. Publish ACLs narrowed per #949 — broad _INBOX.>/_inbox.> removed now that clipool_standalone sets inbox_prefix=_INBOX.clipool-worker at connect time (ADR-051). allow_responses covers reply publish; subscribe narrowed to match. Explicit _inbox.hub.> publish grant added per postmortem Fix 2.
